text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: During a meeting to discuss our training routine...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oooouch... My head feels like it's about to
burst...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I'm fine. I know the acupoints for
headaches.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
My mom's on her feet a lot for her job, so I used
to give her massages.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I think it's around the back of the neck—

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ugh. The acupoints won't work on this one, I
guess.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The headache keeps Nice Nature from her usual
best.
